metadata.name: Set Up a Patient Payment Plan

description: A patient calls with a large outstanding balance and is unable to pay it all at once. They want to set up a payment plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify the patient's account and verify their total outstanding balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the total amount owed by the patient.

nodes.task_description: Negotiate a monthly payment amount and duration with the patient.

expected_outcome.value: Agent and patient agree on a monthly payment schedule.

nodes.task_description: Set up the payment plan in the billing system, which will generate automatic monthly reminders.

expected_outcome.value: The payment plan is successfully configured in the system.
